name: FCC of Morgantown Pickleball Courts
description: FCC of Morgantown Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Morgantown, IN. There are 3 indoor acrylic and hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Jimmy Nash City Park
description: Jimmy Nash City Park is a place to play pickleball in Martinsville, IN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: YMCA of Morgan County
description: Come play pickleball at YMCA of Morgan County in Martinsville, IN! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Free to Members; Non-members: $4/visit
